member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.None
member.summary: No option is defined.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.ForceFirstUpper
member.summary: First character will be upper case.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.ForceRestLower
member.summary: Characters beyond the first will be lower case.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.UnescapeUnicode
member.summary: Unescape unicode encoding (format is \u0000).

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.UnescapeHexadecimal
member.summary: Unescape hexadecimal encoding (format is \x0000).

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.ReplaceSpacesByUnderscore
member.summary: Replaces spaces by underscore.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.ReplaceSpacesByMinus
member.summary: Replaces spaces by minus.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.ReplaceSpacesByDot
member.summary: Replaces spaces by dot.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.KeepFirstUnderscores
member.summary: Keep first underscores sticked as is.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.DontDecamelizeNumbers
member.summary: Numbers are not considered as separators.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.KeepFormattingIndices
member.summary: Keep indices used by the String.Format method.

member.name: F:Skua.Core.Utils.DecamelizeTextOptions.Default
member.summary: Defines the default options.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.EnumerableExtensions.Swap``1(System.Collections.Generic.IList{``0},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Swaps the items of a list at the given indexes.
member.param: The current list being manipulated.
Index of the first item to swap.
Index of the second item to swap.
member.returns: The list with the swapped items.

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Utils.WebClient
member.summary: HttpClient with connection pooling

member.summary: All HttpClients

member.summary: Gets the GitHub Client

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.UserGitHubClient
member.summary: Gets the GitHub User Client

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.GetAQContent
member.summary: Gets the Map Client

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.Default
member.summary: Default HttpClient

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.GitHubRaw
member.summary: GitHub Raw Content Client - for raw.githubusercontent.com requests

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.CreateSafeHttpClient
member.summary: Creates a new HttpClient that won't cause socket exhaustion - use this instead of 'new HttpClient()'

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.CreateSafeGitHubRawClient
member.summary: Creates a new HttpClient for raw.githubusercontent.com that won't cause socket exhaustion - use this instead of 'new HttpClient()' for github raw requests only.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.MakeGitHubApiRequestAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Makes a GitHub API request with automatic rate limiting and validation

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.HttpClients.GetGHClient
member.summary: Gets either the GitHub or Github User Client

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Utils.ValidatedHttpExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for validated HTTP requests

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.ValidatedHttpExtensions.GetAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String)
member.summary: Makes a validated GET request that throws on failure

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.ValidatedHttpExtensions.GetAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Makes a validated GET request with cancellation token that throws on failure

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.ValidatedHttpExtensions.GetStringAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String)
member.summary: Gets string content with validation

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.ValidatedHttpExtensions.GetAsyncWithRetry(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets string content with validation and retries that throws on failure

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.MemoryUtils.TrimWorkingSet
member.summary: Forces a massive Garbage Collection pass and trims the process working set, significantly reducing the memory footprint of bloated COM objects like the Flash Player.

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1
member.summary: Implementation of a dynamic data collection based on generic , implementing to notify listeners when items get added, removed or the whole list is refreshed.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of RangedObservableCollection that is empty and has default initial capacity.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RangedObservableCollection class that contains elements copied from the specified collection and has sufficient capacity to accommodate the number of elements copied.
member.param: The collection whose elements are copied to the new list.
member.remarks: The elements are copied onto the RangedObservableCollection in the same order they are read by the enumerator of the collection.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1.AddRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Adds the elements of the specified collection to the end of the RangedObservableCollection.
member.param: The collection whose elements are added to the list.
member.remarks: The elements are copied onto the RangedObservableCollection in the same order they are read by the enumerator of the collection.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1.ReplaceRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Clears the current RangedObservableCollection and replaces the elements with the elements of specified collection.
member.param: The collection whose elements are added to the list.
member.remarks: The elements are copied onto the RangedObservableCollection in the same order they are read by the enumerator of the collection.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1.RemoveRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Removes the first occurence of each item in the specified collection.
member.param: The collection whose elements are removed from list.
member.remarks: The elements are copied onto the RangedObservableCollection in the same order they are read by the enumerator of the collection.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1.RemoveRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Removes a range of elements from the collection by index.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.RangedObservableCollection`1.Replace(`0)
member.summary: Clears the current RangedObservableCollection and replaces the elements with the specified element.
member.param: The element which is added to the list.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.StringUtils.RemoveLetters(System.String)
member.summary: Removes all non numeric characters from a string.
member.param: Text that will have the letters removed.
member.returns: A string with only numeric characters

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.StringUtils.Join(System.String[],System.Char)
member.summary: Joins a string array with the defined separator.
member.param: Array of items to be joined.
separator that will join the strings.
member.returns: A string that consists of the elements of delimited by the character.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.StringUtils.Join(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Char)
member.summary: Joins a string list with the defined separator.
member.param: List of items to be joined.
separator that will join the strings.
member.returns: A string that consists of the elements of delimited by the character.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.StringUtils.Join(System.String[],System.String)
member.summary: Joins a string array with the defined separator.
member.param: Array of items to be joined.
separator that will join the strings.
member.returns: A string that consists of the elements of delimited by the string.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.StringUtils.Join(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Joins a string list with the defined separator.
member.param: List of items to be joined.
separator that will join the strings.
member.returns: A string that consists of the elements of delimited by the character.

member.name: T:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1
member.summary: A list that allows synchronous operations.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Items
member.summary: The items contained in this list.

member.name: P:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of elements contained in the

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an object to the end of the .
member.param: The object to be added to the end of the . The value can be null for reference types.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.AddRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Adds the elements of the specified collection to the end of the
member.param: The collection whose elements should be added to the end of the . The collection itself cannot be null, but it can contain elements that are null, if type T is a reference type.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Remove(`0)
member.summary: Removes the first occurrence of a specific object from the
member.param: The object to remove from the . The value can be null for reference types.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Remove(System.Predicate{`0})
member.summary: Removes all the elements that match the conditions defined by the specified predicate.
member.param: The delegate that defines the conditions of the elements to remove.
member.returns: The number of elements removed from the .

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Find(System.Predicate{`0})
member.summary: Searches for an element that matches the conditions defined by the specified predicate, and returns the first occurrence within the entire .
member.param: The delegate that defines the conditions of the element to search for.
member.returns: The first element that matches the conditions defined by the specified predicate, if found; otherwise, the default value for type T.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Any
member.summary: Determines if there is any item inside the underlying list.
member.returns: if the list contains any items, otherwise .

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Any(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Determines if any item inside the underlying list satisfies the condition.
member.returns: if the list is not empty and have at-least one item that satifies the , otherwise .

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.Clear
member.summary: Removes all elements of the .

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.SynchronizedList`1.ForEach(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Performs the specified action on each element of the .
member.param: The delegate to perform on each element of the .

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.TimeLimiter.LimitedRun(System.String,System.Int32,System.Action)
member.summary: Runs an if the specified has passed since its last invoke.
member.param: Name of the action (must be unique for your action).
Delay between the invoking of the
to invoke.

member.name: M:Skua.Core.Utils.TimeLimiter.CleanupOldEntries
member.summary: Removes entries older than the cleanup threshold to prevent memory growth.
